certificates.content: This is to certify that Rahul Kumar (ID: STU001) is a bonafide student of The Gurukul High, K.R. Nagar, Mysuru, studying in Class 8-A during the academic year 2026-27. This certificate is issued on 16 March 2026 for the purpose of general use.

This is to certify that Priya Sharma (ID: STU002) has been a student of this institution. During their stay, their character and conduct have been Good. They are known to be honest, hardworking, and well-behaved. Issued on 16 March 2026.

This is to certify that Rahul Kumar (ID: STU001) is a bonafide student of The Gurukul High, K.R. Nagar, Mysuru, studying in Class 8-A during the academic year 2026-27. This certificate is issued on 16 March 2026 for the purpose of College Application.
